sources.title: Agentic Generation of AST Transformation Rules for Fixing Breaking Updates
sources.authors: Frank Reyes, Benoit Baudry, Martin Monperrus

sources.title: AgentGuard: Runtime Verification of AI Agents
sources.venue: Proceedings of the 40th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE 2025)

claims.text: BIGBAG's best-performing configuration achieves a 94.3% compile success rate
Fix Rate peaks at 78.6% under the GeminiCLI/Gemini-3.1-Pro/JavaParser configuration
JavaParser outperforms Spoon by up to 17.8% CRR due to simpler Visitor API scaffolding
ADP-MA uses progressive sampling across XS/S/M escalation tiers before full dataset execution
ADP-MA explicitly leaves __builtins__ unrestricted in its exec sandbox
AgentGuard's MDP baseline is learned dynamically from execution traces, not human-authored
AgentGuard's safety constraints are human-authored in a static YAML configuration file
RTDC uses a discovery-synthesize-verify-promote loop to accumulate versioned capability artefacts
The Neural Shield uses a 4,301-schema training corpus with Semantic Cross-Pollination augmentation
The Neural Shield achieves under 0.1ms hot-path inference latency via MD5-keyed LRU cache
Reported 100% True Positive Rate and 0% False Positive Rate on the Neural Shield classifier
MCP requires clients to grant unconditional trust over server-supplied tool schemas
Static tool enumeration across 50 enterprise systems at 10 tools × 150 tokens = 75,000 token overhead per prompt
claims.note: Extrapolated from standard LLM token economics — not sourced

claims.text: JSON-RPC description field as payload delivery vector in Tool Poisoning attack
claims.note: Extrapolated from standard cybersecurity principles — not sourced
